title: From your idea to the App Store. In 3 steps.
description: A transparent process with concrete deliverables at each step. You know exactly what you're getting.

steps.title: Scoping & mockups
steps.description: We take the time needed to fully understand your project: your users, goals, and constraints. Then I deliver a scoping document with features, screen-by-screen mockups, timeline and detailed quote.

steps.title: Development & demos
steps.description: Every week, you test a new version of your app on your phone. You see real-time progress and can request adjustments before moving on.

steps.title: Publication & support
steps.description: I create your developer accounts, prepare store listings (screenshots, description, keywords) and submit your app. After launch: 3 months of bug fixes included.
